title: Comrades Recovery Stack
body_html:
A three-bottle stack for distance runners and the cycling 947 weekend warrior — turmeric C3 for inflammation, magnesium glycinate for recovery sleep, and MSM for joint and connective tissue load.

What's inside

  • Turmeric C3 Complex 500 mg — 1 capsule with breakfast + 1 post-long-run. 95% curcuminoids + piperine = real absorption.
  • Magnesium glycinate 300 mg — 1–2 evening capsules. Muscle recovery + sleep depth.
  • MSM 1,000 mg — 1 capsule twice daily. Connective tissue and joint support during training load.

Why we bundled it

The two things that break a Comrades campaign are recovery debt and joint flare. Curcumin works on the inflammation pathway, magnesium works on the recovery side, and MSM is the connective-tissue insurance.

How to take it

Start at the beginning of the training block (typically Feb–March). Double curcumin on long-run weeks. Run the magnesium year-round; it's the highest-leverage single nutrient for sleep.
